title: Four Desperate Men
writer: Harry Watt, Inman Hunter, Lee Robinson
actors: Aldo Ray, Heather Sears, Neil McCallum
plot: Three men attempt a prison break, but their plan derails when their boat falters near an island, where the caretaker recognizes the convict. A hostage situation erupts, leading to a tense standoff with authorities.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 nominations total
